MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kathy Huibonhoa, Esq. of Grube Brown & Geidt LLP, Tel. 415.603.5008, for defendant and moving party CISCO SYSTEMS, INC.;
Thomas Litton, Esq. of the Law Offices of Thomas Litton, Tel. 415.421.4774, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the Court read the tentative ruling into the record. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CISCO SYSTEMS, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is granted. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org.
